text: {"claims":[{"statement":"In 2017, world production of chicken eggs was 80.1 million tonnes.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"In 2017, world production of chicken eggs was 80.1 million tonnes.","entailment":"The quoted sentence directly states the amount of chicken egg production in 2017.","population":"world","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"80.1 million tonnes of chicken eggs produced","timeframe":"2017","quantifiers":"80.1 million tonnes","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"The largest producers were China with 31.3 million of this total, the United States with 6.3 million, India at 4.8 million, Mexico at 2.8 million, Japan at 2.6 million, and Brazil and Russia with 2.5 million each.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"The largest producers were each.","entailment":"The sentence lists the top egg‑producing countries and their respective production amounts.","population":"world egg production","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"production amounts per country","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"31.3 million, 6.3 million, 4.8 million, 2.8 million, 2.6 million, 2.5 million each","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"The largest egg factory in British Columbia, for example, ships 12 million eggs per week.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"The largest egg factory in British Columbia, for example, ships 12 million eggs per week.","entailment":"The quoted clause reports the weekly shipment volume of the largest British Columbia egg factory.","population":"egg factory in British Columbia","intervention":"shipping eggs","comparator":"","outcome":"12 million eggs per week","timeframe":"per week","quantifiers":"12 million eggs","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"For the month of January 2019, the United States produced 9.41 billion eggs, with 8.2 billion for table consumption and 1.2 billion for raising chicks.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"For the month of January 2019, the United States produced 9.41 billion eggs, with 8.2 billion for table consumption and 1.2 billion for raising chicks.","entailment":"The sentence provides the total egg production in the U.S. for January 2019 and its allocation between table consumption and chick raising.","population":"United States","intervention":"egg production","comparator":"","outcome":"9.41 billion eggs total; 8.2 billion for table consumption; 1.2 billion for raising chicks","timeframe":"January 2019","quantifiers":"9.41 billion, 8.2 billion, 1.2 billion","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Americans are projected to each consume 279 eggs in 2019, the highest since 1973, but less than the 405 eggs eaten per person in 1945.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Americans are projected to each consume 279 eggs in 2019, the highest since 1973, but less than the 405 eggs eaten per person in 1945.","entailment":"The quoted sentence gives a projection of per‑person egg consumption for 2019 and compares it to historic values.","population":"Americans","intervention":"egg consumption","comparator":"1973 and 1945 levels","outcome":"279 eggs per person in 2019","timeframe":"2019","quantifiers":"279 eggs, 405 eggs","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"In 2023, world hen egg production reached 91 million tonnes, a 77% increase from 2000 which translates into an additional 40 million tonnes over that time.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"In 2023, world hen egg production reached 91 million tonnes, a 77% increase from 2000 which translates into an additional 40 million tonnes over that time.","entailment":"The sentence states the 2023 production level and quantifies the increase since 2000.","population":"world","intervention":"hen egg production","comparator":"2000 level","outcome":"91 million tonnes in 2023; 77% increase; 40 million tonnes additional","timeframe":"2023 (comparison to 2000)","quantifiers":"91 million tonnes, 77%, 40 million tonnes","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"During production, eggs can be candled to check their quality.","claimType":"methodological","quote":"During production, eggs can be candled to check their quality.","entailment":"The quote describes candling as a method used during egg production for quality assessment.","population":"","intervention":"candling of eggs","comparator":"","outcome":"quality check","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"If fertilization took place three to six days or earlier prior to the candling, blood vessels can usually be seen as evidence that the egg contains an embryo.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"If fertilization took place three to six days or earlier prior to the candling, blood vessels can usually be seen as evidence that the egg contains an embryo.","entailment":"The sentence states a conditional observation linking early fertilization to visible blood vessels during candling.","population":"","intervention":"fertilization timing","comparator":"","outcome":"blood vessels visible as evidence of embryo","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"three to six days or earlier","modality":"conditional"},{"statement":"Contrary to common misconception, this is not conclusive evidence of fertilization, as blood vessels can just denote an ordinary rupture on the egg yolk surface while the egg was forming.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Contrary to common misconception, this is not conclusive evidence of fertilization, as blood vessels can just denote an ordinary rupture on the egg yolk surface while the egg was forming.","entailment":"The quote clarifies that visible blood vessels do not definitively indicate fertilization, correcting a misconception.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"blood vessels are not conclusive evidence of fertilization","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Depending on local regulations, eggs may be washed before being placed in egg boxes, although washing can shorten their length of freshness.","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Depending on local regulations, eggs may be washed before being placed in egg boxes, although washing can shorten their length of freshness.","entailment":"The sentence reports that egg washing is conditional on regulations and may reduce freshness duration.","population":"","intervention":"washing eggs","comparator":"","outcome":"shortened freshness length","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"conditional"}]}
